_comment_header: Purpose: Space structures far enough apart that each feels
like a genuine discovery rather than background noise.
spacing   = chunk grid cell size (structures spawn max once per cell)
separation = minimum chunk gap between two structures of this type
separation MUST be less than spacing or the game ignores the config.
Our target: roughly one structure per 3-4 chunk cells.
- Structures appear on average every ~28-48 chunks (~450-750 blocks)
- No two structures of the same type are closer than 20 chunks (~320 blocks)
Dungeons and Taverns v4.7+ may use its own datapack-based config
system instead of this JSON. If structure frequency is unchanged
after placing this file, check if the mod generates a config folder
or uses /gamerule or in-game sliders instead.

structure_frequency._comment_tavern: Roadside taverns — the most common overworld structure. Spacing 48 = ~750 block spread on average.
structure_frequency._comment_small_house: Abandoned houses — scattered rural ruins. Kept fairly common for early loot.
structure_frequency._comment_abandoned_house: Larger abandoned farmsteads. Slightly rarer than small houses.
structure_frequency._comment_desert_temple: Desert pyramid structures — medium rarity matches Terralith desert biome density.
structure_frequency._comment_jungle_temple: Jungle shrines — rare, rewarding to find in dense Terralith jungle biomes.
structure_frequency._comment_pillager_outpost: Pillager Outposts — keep vanilla rarity, slightly spaced for raid balance.
structure_frequency._comment_stronghold_variant: Dungeon-tier structures that may overlap with YUNG's Dungeons territory.
structure_frequency._comment_witch_hut: Witch Huts — swamp structures. Relatively uncommon.
structure_frequency._comment_ocean_ruin: Ocean ruin structures — spread across ocean biomes without clustering.
structure_frequency._comment_shipwreck: Shipwrecks — ocean-going players should find these with Lootr instanced loot.

general._comment_loot_tables: Use Lootr-compatible loot tables where available (Lootr instances chests per player).
general._comment_jigsaw: Jigsaw generation for modular structures — required for D&T v4.7+ structure variants.
general._comment_avoid_water: Prevent structures from generating partially submerged in rivers/lakes.
general._comment_biome_filter: Respect biome tags when placing structures (taverns won't appear in oceans, etc.).
